UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff GRM Properties LLC is present with counsel, Daniel Bornstein.
Defendant Chris McKIm is present.
Attorney, Selby Lighthill for Defendant, full scope.

The Judge pro Tem and litigants confer in Dept. 620 for settlement discussions. This case settled.

Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported, (501)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff GRM Properties, LLC is present. Represented by, Andre Ferrigno.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christian McKim is present.
Attorney, Selby Lighthill is appearing for the Defendant.
The Judge Pro Tem Rick Warren, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle. The trial date of October 15, 2013 remains on calendar.
